reasons: Saber's airborne ultimate can interrupt Odette's channel if timed during Swan Song.
Saber also threatens Odette before she can set up.

proof.summary: Odette wants to channel Swan Song safely, while Saber can knock her airborne and interrupt the key channel window.
worksBestWhen: Saber waits for Odette to commit Swan Song.
Saber has access to Odette through flank or vision control.
failureCases: Saber is forced to use ultimate before Odette commits.
Odette's team zones Saber away from her casting position.

reasons: Franco's suppression can interrupt or prevent Odette's key channel window.
He can also hook Odette before she reaches a safe ultimate position.

proof.summary: Odette wants to keep channeling in place, while Franco can suppress or hook her during the setup or channel window.
worksBestWhen: Franco saves Bloody Hunt for Swan Song.
Franco threatens hook angles before Odette sets up.
failureCases: Franco misses hook and cannot enter suppression range.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag Odette out of her ideal Swan Song position.
This is a strong anti-channel answer when Kaja has flank access.

proof.summary: Odette's teamfight value depends on maintaining Swan Song position, while Kaja can suppress and drag her away from the fight.
worksBestWhen: Kaja hides vision and waits until Odette commits.
Kaja has teammates ready to punish Odette after the drag.
failureCases: Odette stays too far behind frontline.
Kaja is revealed early and cannot reach Odette.

reasons: Chou can interrupt or displace Odette with airborne and knockback tools.
This counter is stronger in skilled hands because Chou must reach Odette through her team.

proof.summary: Odette wants to channel from a stable position, while Chou can break her positioning with airborne and displacement if he reaches her.
worksBestWhen: Chou times the combo after Odette commits Swan Song.
failureCases: Chou is zoned before reaching Odette.
Chou mistimes the combo or is peeled away.

reasons: Kadita can use control-immunity movement to enter or escape Odette's damage zone and threaten burst.
This is more conditional than suppression counters because Kadita still needs timing and damage setup.

proof.summary: Odette wants enemies trapped inside Swan Song, while Kadita can cross dangerous space with control immunity and punish Odette's stationary cast.
worksBestWhen: Kadita attacks after Odette uses defensive tools.
failureCases: Kadita enters too early and gets peeled.
Kadita misses the setup and is caught inside Odette's team.
